name: howbiscuit-site
description: How Biscuit publishing shell built with custom Astro components.

scripts.dev: npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check && node scripts/build-static.mjs
scripts.check: npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check
scripts.qa: npm run build && node --test test/*.test.mjs && node scripts/lint-content.mjs
scripts.qa:pi:inner: npm run latex:compile && npm run contracts:check && npm run typecheck:contracts && astro check && node scripts/build-static.mjs --pi-pagefind-skip && node --test test/*.test.mjs && node scripts/lint-content.mjs
